cmake3.import_reason: Initially imported by us, XS started using it. For XS 8, they forked cmake-3.26.4-4.fc37.src.rpm. At first, we keep ours because we found nothing that would require cmake3 in recent updates

coretemp-module-alt.import_reason: added to workaround missing CPU temperature sensors in dom0

netdata.import_reason: netdata package for XO, netdata-ui for users

protobuf.import_reason: dep and builddep for netdata, which needs protobuf 3

protobuf-c.import_reason: dep and builddep for netdata, which needs a version of protobuf-c compatible with protobuf 3

rsyslog.import_reason: updated by us to rsyslog-8.24.0-52.el7_8.2 for memory leak fixes. Dependency libfastjson not updated but would need to be if we used the mm-normalize plugin (RHBZ #1591493)

xcp-ng-deps.import_reason: meta package that defines default installation
